name: asr
author: hagency
description: OminiX ASR, TTS, and podcast generation via local Qwen3 models on Apple Silicon

tools.name: voice_transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe an audio file to text using OminiX ASR (Qwen3). Supports WAV, OGG, MP3, FLAC, M4A. Use this when you receive a voice message or need to extract text from audio. Returns the transcribed text.

audio_path.description: Absolute path to the audio file to transcribe

tools.name: voice_synthesize
tools.description: Synthesize speech from text using OminiX TTS (Qwen3). Produces a WAV audio file. Use this when the user asks for a voice reply or text-to-speech. After generating, use send_file to deliver the audio to the user.

text.description: The text to synthesize into speech

output_path.description: Path to save the WAV file. Default: /tmp/crew_tts_<timestamp>.wav

tools.name: generate_podcast
tools.description: Generate a multi-speaker podcast audio file from a dialogue script. Each line specifies a speaker voice and text. The tool synthesizes each line and concatenates them into a single WAV file. Optionally converts to MP3 if ffmpeg is available.

script.description: Dialogue script as an array of lines

output_path.description: Path to save the final audio. Default: /tmp/crew_podcast_<timestamp>.wav

tools.name: voice_clone_synthesize
tools.description: Synthesize speech using voice cloning. Provide a reference audio file (3-10s of the target speaker) and the text to speak. The output will sound like the reference speaker. Use this when the user wants TTS in their own voice or a specific person's voice. After generating, use send_file to deliver the audio.

text.description: The text to synthesize into speech

reference_audio.description: Absolute path to reference audio file (3-10s WAV/OGG/MP3 of target speaker)

output_path.description: Path to save the WAV file. Default: /tmp/crew_voice_clone_<timestamp>.wav
